buttons.primary: w-full min-h-[56px] rounded-xl bg-[#13294B] text-white font-bold text-lg flex items-center justify-center transition-transform active:scale-95 shadow-md
buttons.accent: w-full min-h-[56px] rounded-xl bg-[#FF9933] text-white font-bold text-lg flex items-center justify-center transition-transform active:scale-95 shadow-md
buttons.quiz_option: w-full min-h-[64px] p-4 rounded-xl border-2 text-left bg-white text-slate-800 font-medium transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out flex items-center gap-4 cursor-pointer

cards.dashboard: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex flex-col gap-4
cards.result_summary: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 border border-slate-200 shadow-lg

header.container: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200 px-4 h-16 flex items-center justify-between

timer.container: flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-mono text-lg font-bold bg-slate-100 text-slate-700

transitions.framer_page_enter: { initial: { opacity: 0, y: 10 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, exit: { opacity: 0, y: -10 } }
transitions.framer_item: { hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0 } }

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass APCA and WCAG AA standards. Saffron text should be used carefully on light backgrounds; use it for large elements or backgrounds with white text.
accessibility.tap_targets: Minimum 48px height for all interactive elements to accommodate mobile users.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

image_urls.description: Adalaj Stepwell in Gujarat for cultural resonance on the landing/name entry screen.
Indian student studying, for dashboard or empty states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure Noto Sans Gujarati is loaded via Google Fonts for proper Unicode rendering.
All questions and explanations must support proper wrapping for Gujarati text.
Quiz options must use custom large radio buttons for mobile ease.
Implement Net Score logic (+1, -0.33) updating live in the top right.
Use Recharts (RadarChart) for the final Performance Radar on the Result page.
Timer must switch to 'urgent' styling when under 10 minutes.
Framer Motion must be used for transitioning between quiz questions and dashboard states.
Always apply 'data-testid' to buttons, inputs, and clickable cards.
